programme.title: Zombie House Flipping
programme.desc: Keith finds a half-renovated historic home that the team could flip into one of its biggest profits ever; the old house reveals tons of problems, from an outdated electrical system to crooked floors and a second story with low, sloping ceilings.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping
programme.desc: The team decides to take on their most challenging lakeside transformations yet; from collapsing properties to flood-damaged lots, these Zombies test their skills and patience as they try to turn these derelict properties into breathtaking waterfront makeovers.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping: Family Business
programme.desc: Tommy Harr discovers a rare opportunity in Columbus's upscale Grandview Heights and calls on his inspector dad and brother to give it a closer look before he makes a move; what looks promising quickly raises red flags: mold, outdated wiring, failing plumbing and a dangerously unstable addition; despite the risks, Tommy gambles on the upside and buys the house; but once demolition begins, even bigg

programme.title: Million Dollar Zombie Flips
programme.desc: James Dainard meets his match when tenacious, hands-on flipper Shawna pitches him a partnership on a dated and overgrown zombie-house; determined to prove herself, Shawna is ready to tackle a brutal timeline and do much of the work herself, even if it means swinging a hammer in her cowboy boots; James sees potential in the house but thinks Shawna might be underestimating the work needed to make th

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: In North Carolina, a shady real estate scam leaves Tamera fighting squatters who've seized her beautiful 58-acre property, with her beloved horses trapped inside; as the squatters taunt Flash and his team, tensions explode in a desperate fight to reclaim the land and rescue the animals.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: In Washington, health issues forced Zachary out of his dream home; he rented it to seemingly trustworthy tenants-only to realize they were alleged serial squatters who stopped paying and refused to leave; in one of his toughest fights yet, can Flash and his team take this home back?

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: Kory and Mackenzie bought land to build their future home in rural Spokane, Washington; however, squatters have taken it over and are impacting the nearby property; with the site completely trashed and interactions becoming hostile, Flash and his team step into one of their most unpredictable situations yet.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: Justin and Ashley's plans to sell their home in Auburn, Washington are thrown into chaos when the property is overrun by intruders; when Flash and his team arrive to remove the squatters, what should be a routine civil matter quickly turns criminal, as police descend on the property upending the entire operation.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: During renovations, Andrew's Philadelphia home was taken over by squatters who moved in, changed the locks, and installed security cameras; what begins as a straightforward case quickly escalates into a tense standoff with authorities, as Flash and his team attempt to reclaim the property without any help from the neighborhood.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: Flash Shelton and his team head to Vancouver, Washington to help a homeowner after a house sitter overstays her welcome and becomes an unwanted squatter; when Flash's team attempts to reclaim the home by using surveillance cameras, megaphones and even snakes, the confrontation turns into a tense standoff.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The Lord of Lancaster tries to levy tariffs on his visitors, but Dusty & Lupe manage to distract him long enough to cut out a profit; Dave is finally able to see the light. Kenny's new friends fit him like a glove.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: In West Covina, Dusty uses magic to find his treasure; Lisa, determined to make her carpenter father proud, looks for something to refurbish and ends up channeling something else; Ivy wrestles with heels and tools, while Brandi gets in the ring to honor her grandpa.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The buyers return to Moreno Valley, where an old friend surprises them; Dusty & Lupe do their best to hit it out of the park; Ivy finds a couple of "less scary" coffins; Brandi isn't going to let anything ruin her bright and sunny attitude.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Torrance gives props to Dusty & Lupe who are haunted by their locker; Kenny manages to kill several birds with one locker; Brandi gets all medieval with some strange music boxes, while Lisa re-joins the rest of the fleas to drop some new records.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Buyers chase lockers rumored to be packed with rock 'n' roll memorabilia, from vintage guitars to rare collectibles; big risks lead to surprising finds, while expert appraisers determine what's a true treasure and what's just noise.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Back in Montebello, good things come in small boxes, unless you're Lisa; Ivy's locker brims with sellable items; Emily thanks her lucky stars for a mountain of merch; Kenny and his punchy pal rave about their frenzied find.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Bathed in the heat of Moreno Valley, Kenny has difficulty with names, so he calls an audible; Brandi can't catch a break without some help from above; Dave gets stuck with the business end of an unsatisfying locker; Dusty and Lupe put their "street" smarts to good use.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Lisa keeps getting her lockers taken from her, and it makes her hopping mad; Kenny goes in for a banjo but comes out with a harmonica; Dusty and Lupe find the locker of her dreams; Ivy finds a vehicle in his locker, just not the one he expected.
